_description: Competitor Repo Tracking — Monitor competing projects for feature releases, security issues, and development velocity

repos.why: Track OpenAI SDK updates, new model integrations
Monitor Anthropic SDK for new capabilities

use_cases: Daily digest of competitor development activity
Track feature velocity across competing projects
Detect breaking changes before they affect your integrations
tips: Use the significance score to prioritize: 7+ = worth reading, 4-6 = skim, 1-3 = skip
Watch for warning-level commits touching auth, security, or .sol files
Set up digest at 9am to review before standup
